---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .cv-intro {
    min-height: 20vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .cv-embed {
    width: 100%;
    height: 80vh;
    border: 1px solid #d9d9d9;
    border-radius: 6px;
  }
</style>
```

::: {.cv-intro}
A copy of my CV can be found [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7gr1y6ei8rstgvzisngv4/Ballard-CV.pdf?dl=0&rlkey=5t1ivw044d6pqxndiv4djw88c).
:::

```{=html}
<iframe
  class="cv-embed"
  src="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7gr1y6ei8rstgvzisngv4/Ballard-CV.pdf?raw=1&rlkey=5t1ivw044d6pqxndiv4djw88c"
  title="Andy Ballard CV"
></iframe>
```
